vllm.title: [Feature | CI] Added a github action to build wheels
vllm.author: Danielkinz
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Changes
Created a new action called "Create Release" (publish.yml) which automatically detects a branch of the format "release/<version>", creates a release with same version, build and uploads wheels for said release.
Supported Versions:

vllm.title: set default coompute capability according to cuda version
vllm.author: zxdvd
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I'm building docker image in a machine without CUDA. And I got following error since I use cuda 11.7 and it set default capabilities to {70, 75, 80, 86, 90}.
CUDA 11.8 or higher is required for GPUs with compute capability 9.0.
